CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Feb-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Bi-Rite Restaurant Supply's application for right to attach order and writ of attachment is granted. No opposition has been filed. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
